description: Zero-trust container namespace isolation for FractalPrior clinical inference pipeline

namespace_a.description: Isolated inference namespace — read-only model weights, no PHI, no egress

namespace_b.description: Isolated audit namespace — append-only decision audit logging, no PHI

namespace_c.description: Isolated IPFS namespace — metadata provenance only, no PHI

namespace_d.description: Isolated orchestration namespace — resource scheduling only, no PHI
